input_data.code:
import yaml
import hashlib
def process_config(config_data):
    config = yaml.load(config_data)
    hash_val = hashlib.sha1(config['password'].encode()).hexdigest()
    return hash_val

findings.title: Insecure YAML deserialization
findings.description: Using yaml.load() without a Loader parameter enables arbitrary code execution when processing untrusted YAML data
findings.fix: Use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load() or specify a safe loader like yaml.load(config_data, Loader=yaml.SafeLoader)

findings.title: Weak cryptographic hash function for password
findings.description: SHA1 is cryptographically weak and unsuitable for password hashing due to collision vulnerabilities and lack of salt
findings.fix: Use a strong password hashing algorithm like bcrypt, scrypt, or Argon2, or at minimum use SHA-256 with proper salting
